matchingDescription: Antivirus and VPN bundle, ransomware protection, dark web monitoring, multi-device household

variants.text: Norton 360 provides award-winning antivirus, a no-log VPN, and dark web monitoring — comprehensive protection for your devices and identity.
Protect your files from ransomware with Norton 360's advanced threat detection — real-time protection that blocks attacks before encryption begins.
Norton 360 monitors the dark web for your personal information and alerts you if your data appears in a breach — protection that goes beyond your device.

UK cybersecurity incidents rose 31% in 2024 according to the NCSC annual review, with phishing the most common attack vector for individuals. One in three UK adults who received a phishing attempt in 2023 reported clicking the link (Ofcom Online Safety Report).

Ransomware attacks on UK individuals increased 40% year-on-year in 2024 (NCSC). The average ransom demand in consumer-targeted attacks reached £800 in 2023 — but paying the ransom does not guarantee file recovery, with only 65% of victims regaining access.

Have I Been Pwned records over 13 billion compromised accounts globally. The UK's ICO received 2,600+ data breach notifications in 2023 alone. Dark web monitoring services alert users within hours of credentials appearing in new breach datasets.
